sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 430 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objections No.3, 17, 25 & 27. 2. For orders on CMA No.3424/2024. 3. For orders on CMA No.3425/2024. 4. For hearing of main case. 26.03.2026 Mr. Faheem Raza Khuhro, advocate for the applicant. Learned counsel submits under instructions that this reference application may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
